summaryForNext: Backend: openspec, driven by /kbd-apply (one task/turn). 4 changes dispatched in dependency order; first pending: add-admin-authn. Per-change QA: artifact-refiner + security-review (all 4 are auth/identity-sensitive) + fail-closed degrades_to_deny test; archive via --skip-specs. Zero new crates. Guardrail: federate any JWT-capable IdM (Ory standard), never become an IdP.
